name: Lloyd AI Group — Finance Foundation
description: Build a complete financial foundation for Lloyd AI Group before the first client — invoicing system live, payment collection ready, and revenue + expense tracking in place.

todos.task: Choose and sign up for invoicing + payment tool (Wave recommended — free, supports Stripe/PayPal, has expense tracking)
Configure account with Lloyd AI Group branding (logo, business name, address, email)
Create invoice templates for each service tier: AI Audit ($0 / $297 / $497), AI Implementation ($2,000–$3,500), AI Retainer ($1,500/mo)
Connect payment processor (Stripe or PayPal) so clients can pay online via invoice link
Build revenue tracking spreadsheet: columns for client, service, invoice date, amount, paid date, status
Set up expense tracking: categories for software, contractors, travel, marketing — log from day one
Research solo business tax basics: quarterly estimated taxes (due dates), deductible expenses, whether to file as sole proprietor or LLC
Decide on business entity: evaluate sole proprietor vs. single-member LLC (liability protection, tax treatment, Indiana filing cost)
Open a dedicated business checking account to keep personal and business finances separate
Prepare engagement letter / scope of work for Top Mexico Real Estate (free AI Audit — document scope, deliverables, timeline)
Send $0 invoice or written confirmation to Top Mexico Real Estate to establish paper trail for first engagement
Define pricing escalation trigger: document the internal rule for when Audit price moves from $0 → $297 → $497
